rule_metadata.author: Mark Morowczynski '@markmorow', Yochana Henderson, '@Yochana-H'
rule_metadata.title: Guest User Invited By Non Approved Inviters

rules.rule_text:
title: Guest User Invited By Non Approved Inviters
id: 0b4b72e3-4c53-4d5b-b198-2c58cfef39a9
status: test
description: Detects when a user that doesn't have permissions to invite a guest user
  attempts to invite one.
references:
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/entra/architecture/security-operations-privileged-accounts#things-to-monitor
author: Mark Morowczynski '@markmorow', Yochana Henderson, '@Yochana-H'
date: 2022-08-10
tags:
- attack.privilege-escalation
- attack.initial-access
- attack.persistence
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1078.004
logsource:
  product: azure
  service: auditlogs
detection:
  selection:
    properties.message: Invite external user
    Status: failure
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- A non malicious user is unaware of the proper process
level: medium
